rationale: Educ. Code §28.051 defines terms for the Texas Advanced Placement Incentive Program. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote:
Sec. 28.051. DEFINITIONS. In this subchapter:
(1) "Board" means the State Board of Education.
_note: No conflict; the cited statute governs advanced placement program definitions, unrelated to homestead exemptions.
